prompt: Design a Unified Campus Operations & Logistics Management Portal to coordinate offline events fulfillment and accountability across Administrators, team leads, reviewers, and regular users. The Layui-based interface uses role-based navigation to separate Administration, Team Leadership, Review, and Personal views, with responsive desktop and mobile layouts and drag-and-drop widgets on the dashboard home. Users create and submit activities that transition through draft, published, in progress, completed, and archived states, while reviewers approve or reject submissions through a detail Drawer with a full status timeline and a per-activity reply count. Inventory and file handling supports JPG, PNG, and PDF attachments up to 10 MB with SHA-256 fingerprinting, low-stock alerts, and barcode-based lookup. Reporting provides filtered data exports in PNG, PDF, and XLSX formats with username + timestamp watermarking. Back-office search indexes activities, inventory items, and user profiles using local full-text search with tokenization, optional synonym matching, basic spell correction, incremental CRUD-triggered indexing, and a nightly cleanup job. Authentication is local username/password with salted hashing, 5 failed-attempt lockout for 15 minutes, and RBAC authorization; sensitive fields are masked in the UI and encrypted at rest. All data is persisted in a MySQL database accessed via ThinkPHP REST-style APIs, deployed fully on-premise with no external dependencies.
